mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(notification_id) AS notification_id, title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(body, 4000, 1) AS body, type, is_read, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS created_at, TO_CHAR(target_section_id) AS target_section_id, TO_CHAR(target_request_id) AS target_request_id FROM notification WHERE recipient_user_id = #{recipientUserId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, notification_id DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(n.notification_id) AS notification_id, n.title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(n.body, 4000, 1) AS body, n.type, n.is_read, TO_CHAR(n.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS created_at, COALESCE(sender_professor.name, sender_student.name, sender.login_id) AS sender_name, c.course_code AS course_id, c.course_name, cs.section_no || '분반' AS division, TO_CHAR(COALESCE(n.target_section_id, cr.section_id)) AS target_section_id, TO_CHAR(n.target_request_id) AS target_request_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(cr.reason, 4000, 1) AS request_reason FROM notification n LEFT JOIN user_account sender ON sender.user_id = n.sender_user_id LEFT JOIN professor sender_professor ON sender_professor.user_id = sender.user_id LEFT JOIN student sender_student ON sender_student.user_id = sender.user_id LEFT JOIN course_request cr ON cr.request_id = n.target_request_id LEFT JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = COALESCE(n.target_section_id, cr.section_id) LEFT JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id WHERE n.recipient_user_id = #{recipientUserId} AND TO_CHAR(n.notification_id) = #{notificationId}
